description: Synthetic public-safe examples showing how delayed user observations can enter the project without private data.

consent.withdrawal_note: Contributor can request removal or further redaction from public issues.

current_formulation.falsifier: private model-building dominates idle time and live execution repeatedly drains energy

follow_up_observations.summary: During [PROJECT], the subject became more energized after turning an ambiguous plan into delegated next actions.
follow_up_observations.privacy_note: No names, workplace, dates, or raw chat text included.

follow_up_observations.summary: During [RELATIONSHIP_CONTEXT] conflict, the subject first tried to fix the external process, then noticed personal hurt later.
After rest in [DATE_RANGE], the subject recovered by rebuilding a concrete action map rather than privately refining a theory for its own sake.
follow_up_observations.privacy_note: No exact dates or location included.

felt_right: The runner-up explanation made the prior INTJ result feel respected.
felt_wrong: The first report understated how much private modeling happens before action.
user_feedback.next_observation_prompt: For the next two weeks, track whether unstructured free time becomes private model refinement or external execution planning.

consent.withdrawal_note: Contributor can request removal or further redaction from public issues.

current_formulation.falsifier: relational pattern convergence repeatedly outranks inner congruence

follow_up_observations.summary: In [DATE_RANGE], the subject chose language that preserved personal congruence even when a smoother group explanation was available.
follow_up_observations.privacy_note: Date range generalized and no group identifiers included.

follow_up_observations.summary: During [RELATIONSHIP_CONTEXT], the subject generated multiple possible meanings before choosing one response, rather than converging on a single relational pattern immediately.
follow_up_observations.privacy_note: No raw dialogue or third-party details included.

follow_up_observations.summary: After [RELATIONSHIP_CONTEXT], the subject reported that the INFJ runner-up felt useful as a contrast, but the decisive point was value congruence before harmony.

felt_right: Keeping INFJ as runner-up reduced defensiveness and made the report easier to test.
felt_wrong: The report initially sounded too certain about social pattern reading.
user_feedback.next_observation_prompt: Track whether future conflict decisions start from inner congruence, relational pattern convergence, or possibility branching.
